bugs_fixed: C130/C122-13 (LOW): Rename _skipOceanFrame → _oceanAltFrame in CoastBiome.ts. The old name implied the flag directly controlled skipping; it actually marks which frame-parity is the skip candidate. Updated declaration comment + toggle + condition. Logic unchanged.

C130/BUG-L-GLBFADE-MURTILE-01 (MEDIUM-doc): Add cancel-safety documentation to LairGLBAssets.ts fadeInGLB call on shared tileMat. Mid-fade cancel via dispose() is safe because scene.traverse() disposes the shared material; next lair visit clones fresh tileMat from re-loaded GLB. No logic change required.
